response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of fullstack experience, deep TypeScript/Node.js work across multiple product companies, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, and a strong testing and software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks). React, MongoDB, Docker/Kubernetes, and AWS experience map well to the stack. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest exposure, and Kotlin/Java experience is limited, but his polyglot track record suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: 18+ years fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js, React, and MongoDB alignment
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, directly matching the AI agent requirement
Deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, test-framework author, and testing workshop instructor
concerns: Kotlin/Java exposure appears limited and dated relative to the secondary stack
Significant time invested in D-language ecosystem, less directly transferable to this stack
